query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS real_users_today,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'google' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS google_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS email_users
FROM users
WHERE DATE(lastSignedIn) = CURDATE()
  AND loginMethod NOT IN ('ga_import', 'NULL')
  AND loginMethod IS NOT NULL;

  SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'google' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS google_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS email_users
FROM users
WHERE DATE(lastSignedIn) = CURDATE()
  AND loginMethod NOT IN ('ga_import', 'NULL')
